channel.title: cz on False Protagonist
channel.description: Recent content in cz on False Protagonist

item.title: Czech Words Frequency List
item.description: I make a decision to learn Czech language and to procrastinate I’ve made up a problem for myself: I need a deck for the Anki with the most frequently accrued words in that language. So my mind considered that problem as a blocker to my further Czech lessons and force me to spend time on it. First of all, I need a data and very convenient way to get a lot of Czech text was a movie subtitle.
